content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Remediated both pending amendments. Contract-marked prompt overrides are now shape-validated and, if they include `## Nearby work`, must match the graph-derived Nearby work body rendered from the bead context, preventing hand-written or stale overrides from inventing review/final-review routing IDs. Prompt-review contract guidance now derives authoritative sections from the actual prompt body, so malformed contract-marked prompts that lack `## Nearby work` no longer instruct refiners to preserve a nonexistent graph-derived section. The prompt-review Nearby work section extractor now uses the shared top-level section parser.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Inspected prompt override creation, canonical prompt validation/guidance, prompt-review drift handling, and planned-elsewhere ID extraction paths for the two pending amendments.
1. [Completed] Added shared top-level canonical section body extraction and used it to identify whether `Nearby work` is actually present when building consumer guidance.
2. [Completed] Added prompt override validation that rejects contract-marked overrides whose `## Nearby work` body differs from the graph-derived body for the active bead context.
3. [Completed] Updated prompt-review Nearby work body comparison to use the shared section extractor and added focused regression coverage for invented override Nearby work and malformed prompt-review guidance without Nearby work.
4. [Completed] Ran focused tests and the repository validation gates required for this bead.

## Validation Evidence

- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub prompt_review_guidance_for_malformed_prompt_without_nearby_work_does_not_preserve_it --lib` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub create_project_from_bead_context_rejects_prompt_override_that_invents_nearby_work --test unit` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo fmt --check` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo clippy --locked -- -D warnings` passed.
- `nix develop -c cargo test --locked --features test-stub` passed.
- `nix build` passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

## Outstanding Risks

None identified.
